label: The Filament Quietroom
description: The Filament Quietroom constitutes a compact sleeping cell cut into the Sixfold Cask’s prismatic shell, its walls set as six shallow facets that mirror Vesper Node’s caging geometry. Dark composite ribs reinforce the corners, while calibrated glass slits admit the port’s disciplined radiance as narrow, hard-angled bands across a low, built-in bunk. Luminous linework is recessed into the floor in a muted register, maintaining the tavern’s regulated scripts without glare. Furnishings remain integral to the structure, with voidstone shelving and vibration-damping panels tuned to the mooring spines’ steady harmonics.
